---
title: "Marie Therèse de Lamourous: foundress of the house of La Miséricorde at Bourdeaux [sic]. A biography abridged from the Fr. [of F. Pouget] by the author of ‘The Heir of Redclyffe’."
---

## Marie Therèse de Lamourous: foundress of the house of La Miséricorde at Bourdeaux [sic]. A biography abridged from the Fr. [of F. Pouget] by the author of ‘The Heir of Redclyffe’.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1858
**Genre:** Edited translation
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John W Parker and Son West Strand, London.

### Notes

The title page may that CMY translated this work herself, which is not the case with all the translations from the French described as ‘edited’ by her.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
